basicDetails.schemeName: Scheme for Providing Soft Skill Training Courses to Students Studying in State Colleges

schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the soft skills of students studying in state colleges of Uttarakhand by providing training through Mahindra Pride Classroom and the Nandi Foundation.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Scheme for Providing Soft Skill Training Courses to Students Studying in State Colleges” scheme is implemented by the Department of Higher Education, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to enhance the soft skills of students studying in state colleges of Uttarakhand by providing training through Mahindra Pride Classroom and the Nandi Foundation.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Soft Skill training courses are being organized in various colleges of the state through Mahindra Pride Classroom and Nandi Foundation.

children.text: The “Scheme for Providing Soft Skill Training Courses to Students Studying in State Colleges” scheme is implemented by the Department of Higher Education, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to enhance the soft skills of students studying in state colleges of Uttarakhand by providing training through Mahindra Pride Classroom and the Nandi Foundation.
Soft Skill training courses are being organized in various colleges of the state through Mahindra Pride Classroom and Nandi Foundation.

Under the Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) between the Government of Uttarakhand and the Nandi Foundation, soft skill courses will be conducted in Satpuli, Kanda, Nainbag, Garud, Lohaghat, Ranikhet, Haldwani, and Raipur. Students from selected government colleges can participate in these courses.

applicationProcess.process_md: Under the Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) between the Government of Uttarakhand and the Nandi Foundation, soft skill courses will be conducted in Satpuli, Kanda, Nainbag, Garud, Lohaghat, Ranikhet, Haldwani, and Raipur. Students from selected government colleges can participate in these courses.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. All students studying in the colleges of Uttarakhand are eligible.

children.text: All students studying in the colleges of Uttarakhand are eligible.
